text.title: Egress Cost Hidden Budget Guide Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: skip-this-methodology — track but no formal budget needed
full report + worst-case model + NAT alternatives review
evaluate VPC endpoints + alternatives in parallel

example.note: Current monthly egress + NAT spend? → matches branch "spend < 500_usd_month" → conclusion ref=r6-quarterly-review
